prompt: Change pick(object, keys) so that it omits properties whose value is undefined. Preserve false, null, zero, and empty-string values.

architectural_rubric.functional_scope: pick omits only undefined values and preserves all other own-property values.
architectural_rubric.ownership_boundary: The generic object-selection behavior remains local to src/utils/pick.js.
architectural_rubric.unrelated_change: Authentication, tokens, users, API routes, and architectural documents are unchanged.
architectural_rubric.unsupported_decision: No unrelated product or architecture decision is introduced.

handoff_rubric.owner_selection: The handoff selects specspine/utilities.md as the sole architectural owner of this generic helper behavior.
handoff_rubric.behavioral_precision: It says that only undefined values are omitted while false, null, zero, and empty strings are preserved.
handoff_rubric.context_minimality: It does not import authentication, authorization, token, user, API, or other unrelated architectural context.
handoff_rubric.handoff_discipline: It remains an architecture context handoff and contains no implementation filename, task list, test scenario, or unrelated decision.

command: const pick=require('./src/utils/pick'); const value=pick({a:undefined,b:false,c:null,d:0,e:'',f:'kept'},['a','b','c','d','e','f','missing']); const expected={b:false,c:null,d:0,e:'',f:'kept'}; if(JSON.stringify(value)!==JSON.stringify(expected)) throw new Error(JSON.stringify(value));
